ratings.en: Fukushû no toki wa kitareri! Ute tetsu jûji dan!!
Kaiki no sekai! Shukumei ni ikiru otoko
Boku tachi no Inochi no Yakusoku
Amaku sasayaku yojo
Ashita naki kotsure keiji
Chichi ni sasage yo tatakae nu yusha no uta o
Dokuro dan tai akuma no reikyusha
Gekitotsu mashin Ji-Pi-Sebun! Kyodai no chikai
Gokiburi shonen dai senso
Haha no mune ni yomigaeru shonen
Hono jigoku ni hebi onna no namida o mita
Ienakiko tachi ni ai no gakuen o
Kagayake nekketsu no yusha
Kaito daburu-o wan tai kumo otoko
Karei naru satsujin mashin e no henshin
Kyofu no han kyojin! Kiseki o yobu gin no ito
Maboroshi no shonen chizu ni nai mura
Meiken yo chichi no moto e hashire
Monsuta kyoshu no Urutora Dokusatsu
Nazo ga nazo o yobu watashi no shuusho no himitsu
Osoroshiki hitto kyoku! Katte odoru satsujin rokku
Puro resura samuson no namida
Senritsu no shikkenshitsu! Akuma no monsuta kyoshu
Ugoku akusesari wa koi no kabuto mushi supai
Yo ni mo fushigi na mukashi ba nashi noroi no neko zuka
